svg.title: MoMo SMS Data Processing System Architecture
svg.desc: High-level architecture showing data flow from XML input through ETL pipeline to database, API, and frontend dashboard

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the momo.xml input file contain?')
sendPrompt('What does parse_xml.py do in the ETL pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What goes into the dead letter log?')
sendPrompt('What tables are in the SQLite database?')
sendPrompt('How does the optional FastAPI layer work?')
sendPrompt('What endpoints does the FastAPI bonus API expose?')
sendPrompt('What does chart_handler.js fetch and render?')
sendPrompt('What does the run.py CLI orchestrate?')
